title: Web Application Authentication Bypass
description: Detects authentication bypass attempts including JWT manipulation, session fixation, and forced browsing to protected endpoints. OWASP A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Web Application Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs') and ((('Attack Type' = 'authentication_bypass' or 'Attack Type' = 'jwt_manipulation' or 'Attack Type' = 'session_fixation' or 'Attack Type' = 'forced_browsing')) or ('OWASP Category' like '*Authentication*'))
